column1: # placeholder-map.tsv — executable copy of the refresh placeholder table.
# registry: blueprint/PLACEHOLDERS.md. genericize.sh applies rows longest-
# search-first; mode word = \b-bounded match, literal = raw substring.
# Deliberately absent (LLM-judgment territory, per refresh.md): domain nouns
# (therapist/patient/session — persona metaphors keep them), roster collapsing
# (N concrete projects -> {project} PATTERN blocks), port numbers (stock
# defaults, not identifying), multi-word stack headers ({BACKEND_STACK} etc.).
